summary: Major stability and release upgrade with installer distribution.
release_notes: Added Windows installer packaging (BlitzTradeInstaller.exe) to release pipeline while keeping auto-update on app binary payloads.
Introduced smarter IB Gateway setup and launch flow with clearer disconnected-state guidance and better startup behavior.
Improved market-data reliability with real-data history retries, scanner subscription throttling, and tighter depth subscription sync for active chart tickers.
Hardened update/download release metadata and endpoint handling for app vs installer artifacts.
Polished analytics and terminal UX details, including ET-based day grouping and improved empty states.
